top_hypothesis: Current fitness=8.2291 with successful RSI bridge tiers, but range-bound bonus only applies to RSI<32 (strong+ oversold), missing moderate oversold tier (RSI 32-38). In range-bound markets, mean-reversion strategies should work well even at moderate oversold levels. Extending range-bound bonus from RSI<32 to RSI<38 captures additional quality mean-reversion signals in choppy markets, giving RSI 32-38 tier a 15% boost (70% → 80.5% effective score) when regime=range_bound.
